description: Searches for files containing a given pattern in a VFS.

pattern.description: The regex pattern to search for (using Go regexp syntax).

path.description: The root directory to search in. Defaults to empty string (root of VFS) if not provided.

include.description: Comma-separated list of glob patterns to filter files. Defaults to empty string (no filtering) if not provided.

limit.description: The maximum number of matches to return. Defaults to 100 if not provided.
